title: Thi Online: Các thì quá khứ
summary: 25 câu trắc nghiệm tổng hợp các thì quá khứ: QKĐ, QKTD, QKHT, QKHT tiếp diễn.

sections.heading: Tóm tắt các thì quá khứ
sections.body:
| Thì | Cấu trúc | Dấu hiệu |
|---|---|---|
| **Quá khứ đơn (QKĐ)** | S + V2/V-ed | yesterday, last week/month/year, ago, in 1990... |
| **Quá khứ tiếp diễn (QKTD)** | S + was/were + V-ing | while, at 7 o'clock last night, when + QKĐ |
| **Quá khứ hoàn thành (QKHT)** | S + had + V3 | before, after, by the time, already, previously |
| **QKHT tiếp diễn** | S + had been + V-ing | for + thời gian + before/when (nhấn mạnh liên tục) |

**Phối hợp thì phổ biến:**
- While + QKTD, QKĐ (đang làm thì bị xen vào)
- When + QKĐ, QKTD (khi đến thì đang...)
- After + QKHT, QKĐ (xong rồi mới...)
- Before + QKĐ, QKHT (trước khi... đã...)
- HTHT + since + QKĐ (kể từ khi...)

exerciseSets.title: Thi Online: Các thì quá khứ

exercises.question: Marry took many photos with her friends while they _________ from Newhaven to Dieppe.
exercises.explanation: While + QKTD (were sailing): hành động chụp ảnh xảy ra trong khi đang đi thuyền.

exercises.question: Sam's brother has written four letters home since he _______ to France.
exercises.explanation: HTHT (has written) + since + QKĐ (moved): kể từ khi chuyển đến Pháp.

exercises.question: She ______ a severe headache while she was taking her exams.
exercises.explanation: While + QKTD (was taking) → QKĐ (had): bị đau đầu trong lúc thi.

exercises.question: In the 18th century, new methods of transportation ________ for carrying products from place to place.
exercises.explanation: In the 18th century → QKĐ bị động: were developed.

exercises.question: She had owned the telephone for 5 years __________ a new smartphone.

options.text: when she was deciding to buy
after she had decided to buy

exercises.explanation: QKHT (had owned) + before + QKĐ (decided): sở hữu 5 năm trước khi quyết định mua mới.

exercises.question: When the guests arrived, my mother _________ the washing-up.
exercises.explanation: When + QKĐ (arrived) → QKTD (was doing): mẹ đang rửa bát khi khách đến.

exercises.question: When he was young, he _____ handsome and attractive.
exercises.explanation: When he was young → QKĐ (was): mô tả trạng thái trong quá khứ.

exercises.question: When we arrived at the stadium to watch the final match, the game ________ for about 20 minutes.
exercises.explanation: When + QKĐ (arrived) → QKHT (had already started): trận đấu đã bắt đầu trước 20 phút.

exercises.question: She had a knee injury while she __________ marbles with her classmates.
exercises.explanation: While + QKTD (was playing): bị chấn thương trong khi đang chơi bi.

exercises.question: Many families _________ to the new location before the flood occurred.
exercises.explanation: Before + QKĐ (occurred) → QKHT (had moved): đã di chuyển trước khi lũ đến.

exercises.question: What ________ at 7 o'clock last night? I phoned you but nobody answered.
exercises.explanation: At 7 o'clock last night → QKTD: were you doing — đang làm gì vào thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ?

exercises.question: After I __________ the stairs to the seventh floor, I was tired.
exercises.explanation: After + QKHT (had climbed) → QKĐ (was tired): leo xong rồi mới mệt.

exercises.question: When the laptop broke down, we __________ our PowerPoint presentation on the topic of 'Wonders of The World.'
exercises.explanation: When + QKĐ (broke down) → QKTD (were giving): đang thuyết trình thì laptop hỏng.

exercises.question: Laura's cousin _______ her a Japanese watch on her sixteenth birthday last week.
exercises.explanation: Last week → QKĐ: bought — hành động hoàn tất trong quá khứ.

exercises.question: Mary took some amazing photos of insects while she __________ in the forest.
exercises.explanation: While + QKTD (was hiking): chụp ảnh trong khi đang đi bộ trong rừng.

exercises.question: Last night, her husband ______ her a big diamond ring at her birthday party.
exercises.explanation: Last night → QKĐ: gave — hành động hoàn tất.

exercises.question: Laura _________ a horror film when she heard the noise outside.
exercises.explanation: When + QKĐ (heard) → QKTD (was watching): đang xem phim thì nghe thấy tiếng động.

exercises.question: While Andrew _________ for Sara outside the theatre, he noticed that the street was crowded.
exercises.explanation: While + QKTD (was waiting): đang đợi thì nhận ra đường đông.

exercises.question: I haven't heard anything from my father since he _______.
exercises.explanation: HTHT (haven't heard) + since + QKĐ (left): kể từ khi anh ấy rời đi.

exercises.question: When my alarm went off at seven o'clock this morning, I __________ a scary dream.
exercises.explanation: When + QKĐ (went off) → QKTD (was having): đang mơ thì chuông reo.

exercises.question: Mary ___________ for her Japanese test when her father came home from work.
exercises.explanation: When + QKĐ (came) → QKTD (was studying): đang ôn thi khi bố về.

exercises.question: After he _______ breakfast, he went to the canteen to have some coffee.
exercises.explanation: After + QKHT (had had) → QKĐ (went): ăn sáng xong rồi mới đi uống cà phê.

exercises.question: ____________, she had studied Spanish.

options.text: By the time she comes to Mexico

exercises.explanation: QKHT (had studied) + before + QKĐ (came): đã học tiếng Tây Ban Nha trước khi đến Mexico.

exercises.question: The outdoor center ________ lots of energetic activities for the kids, like cycling and canoeing last week.
exercises.explanation: Last week → QKĐ: organized.

exercises.question: I traveled around Singapore by car with two friends and we ________ lots of interesting places last summer.
exercises.explanation: Last summer → QKĐ: visited — hai hành động nối tiếp (traveled, visited).
